occupation_title: Ushers, Lobby Attendants, and Ticket Takers
occupation_definition: Assist patrons at entertainment events by performing duties, such as collecting admission tickets and passes from patrons, assisting in finding seats, searching for lost articles, and helping patrons locate such facilities as restrooms and telephones.
